title: Inspect damaged vehicle systems and recommend repairs
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Inspect damaged vehicle systems and recommend repairs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for inspection

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret vehicle specifications from OEM or authorised agency and workplace inspection procedures1.3 Analyse inspection methods, and select and prepare required option for vehicle and job requirements1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks 1.5 Source technical and calibration equipment for vehicle system inspection and check for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret vehicle specifications from OEM or authorised agency and workplace inspection procedures1.3 Analyse inspection methods, and select and prepare required option for vehicle and job requirements1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks 1.5 Source technical and calibration equipment for vehicle system inspection and check for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret vehicle specifications from OEM or authorised agency and workplace inspection procedures1.3 Analyse inspection methods, and select and prepare required option for vehicle and job requirements1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks 1.5 Source technical and calibration equipment for vehicle system inspection and check for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for inspection

elements.title: Inspect damaged vehicle

pcs.text: Carry out inspection according to workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Record extent of vehicle damage and damage location during inspection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out inspection according to workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Record extent of vehicle damage and damage location during inspection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out inspection according to workplace procedures and safety requirements2.2 Record extent of vehicle damage and damage location during inspection.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect damaged vehicle

elements.title: Analyse inspection results

pcs.text: Compare results with vehicle specifications to identify compliance or non-compliance3.2 Determine required repair action following analysis of options3.3 Document repair options with supporting evidence and information3.4 Complete final inspection report according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare results with vehicle specifications to identify compliance or non-compliance3.2 Determine required repair action following analysis of options3.3 Document repair options with supporting evidence and information3.4 Complete final inspection report according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare results with vehicle specifications to identify compliance or non-compliance3.2 Determine required repair action following analysis of options3.3 Document repair options with supporting evidence and information3.4 Complete final inspection report according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Analyse inspection results

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Check and store technical and calibration equipment according to workplace procedures4.2 Process workplace documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and store technical and calibration equipment according to workplace procedures4.2 Process workplace documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and store technical and calibration equipment according to workplace procedures4.2 Process workplace documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
